ops.title: 2026-07-14 Arc cookie wipe — kill-storm tore live DBs, Chromium razed; union self-healed once key warmed; cookiesync exonerated; F1-F5 hardening queued

ops.body:
2026-07-14 ~00:30 PDT: an EXTERNAL actor (closed as unidentifiable — complete window sweep cleared all 19 in-window Claude sessions of any browser/`open` activity; zero Arc crash reports so the relaunches were clean quits not crash-loops; Arc binary unchanged since Jul 10 so not the updater; unified log rotated; NOT a Claude session despite appearances) kill/relaunched Arc until Chromium's integrity check razed ALL Arc profiles' cookie DBs in place (rows deleted, files kept, same-second mtimes). Keychain "Arc Safe Storage" untouched. cookiesync EXONERATED of corruption: reads are copy-then-read (never opens live DB), writes upsert-only, key was cold all night. The daemon-log `wal checkpoint deadline` / `malformed (11)` / `near "FROM"` lines are SPURIOUS torn-copy noise, not live damage (near-FROM = empty-columns Sprintf in stores.go tableColumns/upsertSQL — real bug).

REJECTED THEORY (don't resurrect): a forensics sweep concluded "converge write-back wiped Arc" — impossible twice over: Profile 1/2 are UNTRACKED (no converge path touches them) and Write is INSERT…ON CONFLICT upsert with no DELETE (cannot zero a store). Converge write-backs at 06:42 were the HEAL, not damage. Deploy timeline: session 3d72af98 brew-upgraded this Mac to v0.12.0 at 06:26–06:28 PDT; its install + routed-consent taps (06:29/06:30) warmed keys and the fresh daemon's converge restored Arc (~06:30–06:42). me@laptop residue = pre-Jul-8 test-fixture tombstone (added_at=0, all refs test-only), no fresh leak — current test helpers isolate correctly.

The cold-key gate accidentally firewalled the incident (no propagation, no heal); by ~06:30 a warm key converge SELF-HEALED Arc from the union (9,420 rows, 7,921 pre-wipe-era; peer identical) — additive union, newest-wins, NO tombstones (merge.go): absence never deletes, an emptied store gets restored. Post-heal backups: `~/cookie-rescue-20260714/` on both hosts. Permanent losses: Arc Profile 1/2 cookies (untracked by user decision — spaces keep separate identities) + the ~15:00–22:10 Jul 13 capture gap.

**Why:** next wipe-looking incident: check creation_utc era split + key-warm state before assuming propagation; the union restores on next warm converge — don't panic-restore by hand.

**How to apply:** hardening SHIPPED 2026-07-14 as cookiesync v0.13.0 + synckit v0.14.0, deployed both Macs (F1 VACUUM INTO snapshot reads + ErrStoreBusy hot-journal classification; F2 empty-columns SQL guards; F3 WatchItem.Busy via SingletonLock+kill-0 + IMMEDIATE writes with logged skip; F4 durable rowcount-baseline quarantine at Converge; F5 hostregistry.Config.DirEnv → COOKIESYNC_CONFIG_DIR + testutil.IsolateHostConfig; F6 cregistry.Compact 30d horizon at Driver.SaveRegistry). F7 (consent-leg ioreg kill; cold get_cookies not routing consent) still PARKED on the bridge session owning internal/auth. Deploy gotcha: synckitd install hits launchd error-5 on serve bootstrap during upgrades — bootout+bootstrap manually (papercut filed). Post-deploy both hosts' key caches start cold — first auth tap re-warms. Original queue framing: F1–F6 (atomic clonefile snapshots + ro/immutable reads; empty-columns SQL guard; WatchItem.Busy liveness gate + BEGIN IMMEDIATE; durable mass-drop quarantine; COOKIESYNC_CONFIG_DIR isolation; endpoint identity dedup — registry holds short-name AND FQDN duplicate keys, the gap that keeps phantoms alive). Plus regressions for the routed-consent failures seen live: consent leg dying as `run ioreg: signal: killed` instead of bounded failover; cold get_cookies not attempting the configured route. Fixes build ON DEPLOYED v0.12.0 (this Mac); yasyf-home still on old version — deploy there rides the ship step. Re-anchor converge/daemon cites on the v0.12.0 tree first. See [[cookiesync-architecture]], [[cookiesync-union-hang-and-deadline-fixes]].
